title: Stereo depth estimation
description: Estimates a depth map from a rectified stereo pair. Input is the left/right images plus stereo geometry; output is a metric float32 depth map. Fast-Foundation implements this; it no longer owns any camera.

ir_left_intrinsics.description: Left infrared camera intrinsic matrix K (3x3, row-major). Used for disparity->depth.

z_far.description: Far clip in meters; depths beyond are set to 0.

color_intrinsics.description: Color-camera K, if the depth should be aligned to color.

unit.description: Unit of the depth array values.

intrinsics.description: Intrinsics the depth map is expressed in (color K if aligned).

depth.description: Metric depth map, shape [H, W]. 0 means invalid/no-return.
